en.title: Updates
en.description: A lightweight research stream for recent papers, experiment conclusions, short thoughts, and direction changes. This is meant to keep the site alive between longer writing cycles.
en.panelDescription: Think of this page as a public lab notebook margin: short enough to update often, structured enough to still be useful.

items.title: Website IA refactor
items.summary: Restructuring the site around research, projects, writing, and notes instead of design portfolio tropes.

blocks.text: This round finally shifts the site away from a product-designer portfolio voice and toward a research-facing archive. The key question was not just what pages to add, but what kind of evidence each page should carry.
The homepage now works more like an abstract, while projects, blog posts, and notes hold the real substance.

items.title: Navigation study notes
items.summary: Collected recent papers on embodied navigation and started comparing evaluation setups.

blocks.text: The most useful comparison point so far is not model family, but what each paper decides to count as a successful trajectory and what it leaves out.

items.title: Experiment workflow cleanup
items.summary: Started turning ad hoc experiment logs into a more reusable research operations workflow.

blocks.text: A lot of time was being lost not on experiments themselves, but on recovering assumptions, environment details, and the actual reason one version differed from another.
The goal is to make future notes and reproductions read like compact operational memory, not scattered fragments.

zh.title: 说说
zh.description: 一个轻量技术动态流，用来记录最近读到的论文、刚做完的实验结论、短想法和研究方向变化，让网站在长文之外也保持活着。
zh.panelDescription: 可以把这里理解成公开的研究边角笔记：足够短，便于持续更新；足够清楚，依然能被别人读懂。

items.title: 网站信息架构重构
items.summary: 把网站从设计师作品集改成研究型主页、项目档案库与持续写作平台。

blocks.text: 这次重构最关键的不是多做几个页面，而是先想清楚每个页面到底在证明什么。首页负责快速建立判断，项目、博客和学习负责提供真正有说服力的内容。
这样网站的叙事重心就从“展示感”转向“研究方向、项目质量和持续输出能力”。

items.title: 导航方向文献整理
items.summary: 收集最近的具身导航论文，并开始对比不同工作的评测设置。

blocks.text: 目前最值得比较的不是模型名字，而是每篇工作到底把什么算作成功、把什么过程细节省略掉了。

items.title: 实验工作流整理
items.summary: 开始把零散实验记录改造成更稳定可复用的 research ops 流程。

blocks.text: 很多时间不是花在实验本身，而是花在回忆环境版本、前置假设和为什么这次结果与上次不同。
如果这层操作记忆能被稳稳记下来，后面的复现、复盘和写作都会顺很多。
